ナビゲーション・リンクをスキップ
  • モジュール
  • パッケージ
  • クラス
  • 階層ツリー
  • 索引
  • ヘルプ
SEARCH

索引

A B C D E F G H I L M N O P R S T U V 
すべてのクラスおよびインタフェース|すべてのパッケージ|定数フィールド値

A

Absent keys vs null values - クラス org.commonutils.util.MapSupportの検索タグ
セクション
Annotations - パッケージ org.commonutils.annotationの検索タグ
セクション

B

batchFromClock(Clock, int, RandomGenerator) - クラスのstaticメソッド org.commonutils.id.UuidV7
Returns count UUID v7 values by calling Clock.instant() before each generation.
batchFromInstant(Instant, int, RandomGenerator) - クラスのstaticメソッド org.commonutils.id.UuidV7
Returns count UUID v7 values sharing the same embedded Unix millisecond as instant; random payload bits differ per element.
batchFromInstantOrderedInRange(Instant, Instant, int, RandomGenerator) - クラスのstaticメソッド org.commonutils.id.UuidV7
Returns count UUID v7 values whose embedded Unix milliseconds form a non-decreasing sequence; each millisecond lies in the closed range [minInclusive, maxInclusive] (Instant.toEpochMilli() after validation).
Boolean interpretation - クラス org.commonutils.util.MapSupportの検索タグ
セクション

C

checkFromIndexSize(int, int, int) - クラスのstaticメソッド org.commonutils.lang.ObjectSupport
 
checkFromIndexSize(long, long, long) - クラスのstaticメソッド org.commonutils.lang.ObjectSupport
 
checkFromToIndex(int, int, int) - クラスのstaticメソッド org.commonutils.lang.ObjectSupport
 
checkFromToIndex(long, long, long) - クラスのstaticメソッド org.commonutils.lang.ObjectSupport
 
checkIndex(int, int) - クラスのstaticメソッド org.commonutils.lang.ObjectSupport
 
checkIndex(long, long) - クラスのstaticメソッド org.commonutils.lang.ObjectSupport
 
Choosing UUID version - パッケージ org.commonutils.idの検索タグ
セクション
clamp - クラス org.commonutils.lang.NumberSupportの検索タグ
セクション
clamp(double, double, double) - クラスのstaticメソッド org.commonutils.lang.NumberSupport
Returns value limited to the inclusive range [min, max], using Math.max(double, double) and Math.min(double, double).
clamp(int, int, int) - クラスのstaticメソッド org.commonutils.lang.NumberSupport
Returns value limited to the inclusive range [min, max].
clamp(long, long, long) - クラスのstaticメソッド org.commonutils.lang.NumberSupport
Returns value limited to the inclusive range [min, max].
CollectionSupport - org.commonutils.utilのクラス
Static helpers shared by arbitrary Collection implementations (List, Set, Queue, …): presence checks, safe CollectionSupport.size(Collection), containment tests between collections, and ordered endpoints via SequencedCollection where applicable.
columnWidth(int) - クラスのstaticメソッド org.commonutils.internal.EastAsianWidthColumns
Returns display width in columns (1 or 2) for a Unicode code point.
compare(T, T, Comparator<? super T>) - クラスのstaticメソッド org.commonutils.lang.ObjectSupport
 
configure(String, int) - クラスのメソッド org.commonutils.id.MutableNanoIdGenerator
Atomically replaces alphabet and length.
Containment helpers - クラス org.commonutils.util.CollectionSupportの検索タグ
セクション
containsAll(Collection<?>, Collection<?>) - クラスのstaticメソッド org.commonutils.util.CollectionSupport
Returns true if source contains every element of candidates, using Collection.containsAll(Collection).
containsAny(Collection<?>, Collection<?>) - クラスのstaticメソッド org.commonutils.util.CollectionSupport
Returns true if source contains at least one element that appears in candidates, using Collection.contains(Object) semantics (equality per the source collection).
Contracts - org.commonutils.internalのクラス
Internal helpers enforcing NonNegative and Positive contracts at runtime.
count(CharSequence) - インタフェースのメソッド org.commonutils.lang.LengthCounter
Returns a non-negative length count.
createDefaultFingerprint(RandomGenerator) - クラスのstaticメソッド org.commonutils.id.Cuid2
Builds a default fingerprint: hash(createEntropy({@value #FINGERPRINT_LENGTH}, rng)).substring(0, {@value #FINGERPRINT_LENGTH}).
CROCKFORD_BASE32 - クラスのstatic変数 org.commonutils.id.Ulid
Canonical Crockford Base32 alphabet for ULID (uppercase only in generated strings); ULIDs are case-insensitive when parsing elsewhere, but this library emits uppercase only.
Cuid2 - org.commonutils.idのクラス
Utilities and constants for Cuid2-compatible string identifiers (SHA3-512, base36, session counter, fingerprint).
Cuid2IdGenerator - org.commonutils.idのクラス
IdGenerator for Cuid2-compatible strings: SHA3-512 over UTF-8 inputs, base36, a per-instance session counter, a fixed fingerprint (entropy-derived by default), and a leading random lowercase letter.
Cuid2IdGenerator() - クラスのコンストラクタ org.commonutils.id.Cuid2IdGenerator
Uses Cuid2.DEFAULT_LENGTH, Clock.systemUTC(), and a cryptographically strong RandomGenerator.
Cuid2IdGenerator(int) - クラスのコンストラクタ org.commonutils.id.Cuid2IdGenerator
Uses Clock.systemUTC() and a cryptographically strong RandomGenerator.
Cuid2IdGenerator(int, RandomGenerator) - クラスのコンストラクタ org.commonutils.id.Cuid2IdGenerator
Uses the given length, RandomGenerator, and Clock.systemUTC().
Cuid2IdGenerator(int, RandomGenerator, Clock) - クラスのコンストラクタ org.commonutils.id.Cuid2IdGenerator
Uses the given length, RandomGenerator, and Clock.
Cuid2IdGenerator(int, RandomGenerator, Clock, String) - クラスのコンストラクタ org.commonutils.id.Cuid2IdGenerator
Uses a caller-supplied fingerprint (for example to match a deployment-specific value) with the given length, RandomGenerator, and Clock.
Cuid2IdGenerator(int, RandomGenerator, Clock, String, long) - クラスのコンストラクタ org.commonutils.id.Cuid2IdGenerator
Uses a caller-supplied fingerprint and explicit initial counter (for deterministic tests).

D

deepEquals(Object, Object) - クラスのstaticメソッド org.commonutils.lang.ObjectSupport
Equality for arrays and nested structures; same as Objects.deepEquals(Object, Object).
DEFAULT_ALPHABET - クラスのstatic変数 org.commonutils.id.NanoIdGenerator
Default URL-safe alphabet from Nano ID (64 characters, order preserved).
DEFAULT_ALPHABET_SIZE - クラスのstatic変数 org.commonutils.id.NanoIdGenerator
Number of code points in NanoIdGenerator.DEFAULT_ALPHABET.
DEFAULT_LENGTH - クラスのstatic変数 org.commonutils.id.Cuid2
Default output length (characters), matching @paralleldrive/cuid2.
DEFAULT_SIZE - クラスのstatic変数 org.commonutils.id.NanoIdGenerator
Default string length (Nano ID default).
defaultIfBlank(String, String) - クラスのstaticメソッド org.commonutils.lang.StringSupport
Returns defaultValue when value is null, empty, or blank; otherwise returns value unchanged.
defaultIfEmpty(String, String) - クラスのstaticメソッド org.commonutils.lang.StringSupport
Returns defaultValue when value is null or String.isEmpty(); otherwise returns value unchanged.
defaultIfNull(T, T) - クラスのstaticメソッド org.commonutils.util.MapSupport
Returns map when it is non-null; otherwise returns defaultMap.
defaultString(String) - クラスのstaticメソッド org.commonutils.lang.StringSupport
Returns "" when value is null; otherwise returns value unchanged.
defaultString(String, String) - クラスのstaticメソッド org.commonutils.lang.StringSupport
Returns value when it is non-null; otherwise returns defaultValue.
Depend on this module - モジュール org.commonutilsの検索タグ
セクション

E

EastAsianWidthColumns - org.commonutils.internalのクラス
East Asian display column width from Unicode EastAsianWidth.txt 15.1.0 (UAX #11).
EAW - 列挙クラスの列挙型定数 org.commonutils.lang.Lengths
Sum of East Asian display column widths (typically half-width 1, full-wide 2).
Empty vs blank - クラス org.commonutils.lang.StringSupportの検索タグ
セクション
encode(long, byte[]) - クラスのstaticメソッド org.commonutils.id.Ulid
Encodes a validated Unix millisecond timestamp and exactly 10 random bytes into a canonical ULID string.
ENCODED_LENGTH - クラスのstatic変数 org.commonutils.id.Ulid
Number of characters in a canonical ULID string (10 time + 16 random).
Equality - クラス org.commonutils.lang.StringSupportの検索タグ
セクション
equals(CharSequence, CharSequence) - クラスのstaticメソッド org.commonutils.lang.StringSupport
Returns true if both sequences have the same length and the same char values at every index.
equals(Object, Object) - クラスのstaticメソッド org.commonutils.lang.ObjectSupport
Null-safe equality; same result as Objects.equals(Object, Object).
equalsIgnoreCase(CharSequence, CharSequence) - クラスのstaticメソッド org.commonutils.lang.StringSupport
Like StringSupport.equals(CharSequence, CharSequence), but compares case-insensitively using Character.toUpperCase(char) and Character.toLowerCase(char) on each pair of characters.
Examples - クラス org.commonutils.lang.StringSupportの検索タグ
セクション
Examples - クラス org.commonutils.util.CollectionSupportの検索タグ
セクション
Examples - クラス org.commonutils.util.MapSupportの検索タグ
セクション
Exceptions - クラス org.commonutils.util.CollectionSupportの検索タグ
セクション
Exceptions - クラス org.commonutils.util.MapSupportの検索タグ
セクション
Exported packages - モジュール org.commonutilsの検索タグ
セクション
Extensions beyond java.util.Objects - クラス org.commonutils.lang.ObjectSupportの検索タグ

F

FINGERPRINT_LENGTH - クラスのstatic変数 org.commonutils.id.Cuid2
Length of fingerprint strings produced by Cuid2.createDefaultFingerprint(RandomGenerator).
First and last elements - クラス org.commonutils.util.CollectionSupportの検索タグ
セクション
firstNonNull(T...) - クラスのstaticメソッド org.commonutils.lang.ObjectSupport
Returns the leftmost non-null argument.
fromClock(Clock) - クラスのstaticメソッド org.commonutils.id.Ulid
Creates a ULID from Clock.instant() using a cryptographically strong RandomGenerator.
fromClock(Clock) - クラスのstaticメソッド org.commonutils.id.UuidV7
Creates a UUID v7 from Clock.instant(), using a cryptographically strong RandomGenerator.
fromClock(Clock, RandomGenerator) - クラスのstaticメソッド org.commonutils.id.Ulid
Creates a ULID from Clock.instant() and the given random source.
fromClock(Clock, RandomGenerator) - クラスのstaticメソッド org.commonutils.id.UuidV7
Creates a UUID v7 from Clock.instant() and the given random generator.
fromInstant(Instant) - クラスのstaticメソッド org.commonutils.id.Ulid
Creates a ULID from an instant using a cryptographically strong RandomGenerator.
fromInstant(Instant) - クラスのstaticメソッド org.commonutils.id.UuidV7
Creates a UUID v7 from an instant, using a cryptographically strong RandomGenerator.
fromInstant(Instant, RandomGenerator) - クラスのstaticメソッド org.commonutils.id.Ulid
Creates a ULID from instant and the given random source.
fromInstant(Instant, RandomGenerator) - クラスのstaticメソッド org.commonutils.id.UuidV7
Creates a UUID v7 from an instant and the given random generator.
fromInstantRandomInRange(Instant, Instant, RandomGenerator) - クラスのstaticメソッド org.commonutils.id.UuidV7
Picks a uniformly random Unix millisecond in the closed range [minInclusive, maxInclusive] (compared via Instant.toEpochMilli() after validation), then creates a UUID v7 at that millisecond.

G

generate() - クラスのメソッド org.commonutils.id.Cuid2IdGenerator
Generates a new Cuid2-compatible id.
generate() - インタフェースのメソッド org.commonutils.id.IdGenerator
Creates the next identifier.
generate() - クラスのメソッド org.commonutils.id.MutableNanoIdGenerator
Generates an id using the configuration observed at invocation start.
generate() - クラスのメソッド org.commonutils.id.NanoIdGenerator
Generates a new Nano ID string using this generator's alphabet, length, and random source.
generate() - クラスのメソッド org.commonutils.id.UlidIdGenerator
Generates a new ULID string.
generate() - クラスのメソッド org.commonutils.id.UuidV4IdGenerator
Generates a new version-4 UUID.
generate() - クラスのメソッド org.commonutils.id.UuidV7IdGenerator
Generates a new UUID v7.
generate(int, RandomGenerator, Clock, String, AtomicLong) - クラスのstaticメソッド org.commonutils.id.Cuid2
One Cuid2-shaped id (see Cuid2IdGenerator).
getBoolean(Map<?, ?>, Object) - クラスのstaticメソッド org.commonutils.util.MapSupport
Returns the boolean value mapped to key, or false when the map is null, the key is absent, the stored value is null, or a non-boolean value does not parse as true per Boolean.parseBoolean(String).
getBoolean(Map<?, ?>, Object, boolean) - クラスのstaticメソッド org.commonutils.util.MapSupport
Returns the boolean value mapped to key, or defaultValue when the map is null, the key is absent, or the stored value is null.
getFirst(Collection<? extends T>) - クラスのstaticメソッド org.commonutils.util.CollectionSupport
Returns the first element of collection, or null when collection is null or has no elements.
getInt(Map<?, ?>, Object) - クラスのstaticメソッド org.commonutils.util.MapSupport
Returns the int mapped to key, or 0 when the map is null, the key is absent, the value is null, or parsing fails.
getInt(Map<?, ?>, Object, int) - クラスのstaticメソッド org.commonutils.util.MapSupport
Returns the int mapped to key, or defaultValue when map is null, the key is absent, or the value cannot be parsed as an int.
getLast(SequencedCollection<? extends T>) - クラスのstaticメソッド org.commonutils.util.CollectionSupport
Returns the last element of collection, or null when collection is null or empty.
getLong(Map<?, ?>, Object) - クラスのstaticメソッド org.commonutils.util.MapSupport
Returns the long mapped to key, or 0L when the map is null, the key is absent, the value is null, or parsing fails.
getLong(Map<?, ?>, Object, long) - クラスのstaticメソッド org.commonutils.util.MapSupport
Returns the long mapped to key, or defaultValue when map is null, the key is absent, or the value cannot be parsed as a long.
getString(Map<?, ?>, Object) - クラスのstaticメソッド org.commonutils.util.MapSupport
Returns the string form of the value mapped to key, or null when map is null, the key is absent, or the stored value is null (via ObjectSupport.toString(Object, String) with a null default).
getString(Map<?, ?>, Object, String) - クラスのstaticメソッド org.commonutils.util.MapSupport
Returns the string form of the value mapped to key, or defaultValue when map is null or the key is absent.

H

hash(Object...) - クラスのstaticメソッド org.commonutils.lang.ObjectSupport
 
hashCode(Object) - クラスのstaticメソッド org.commonutils.lang.ObjectSupport
Hash code for null or delegate; same as Objects.hashCode(Object).

I

IdGenerator<T> - org.commonutils.idのインタフェース
Generates identifiers of type T.
INITIAL_COUNT_MAX - クラスのstatic変数 org.commonutils.id.Cuid2
Exclusive upper bound for sampling the initial counter (initialCountMax in the reference).
isBlank(CharSequence) - クラスのstaticメソッド org.commonutils.lang.StringSupport
Returns true if value is null, empty, or every code unit is Unicode whitespace per Character.isWhitespace(char).
isDigits(CharSequence) - クラスのstaticメソッド org.commonutils.lang.NumberSupport
Returns true if value is non-null, non-empty, and every code unit is a decimal digit per Character.isDigit(char).
isEmpty(CharSequence) - クラスのstaticメソッド org.commonutils.lang.StringSupport
Returns true if value is null or CharSequence.isEmpty().
isEmpty(Collection<?>) - クラスのstaticメソッド org.commonutils.util.CollectionSupport
Returns true if collection is null or Collection.isEmpty().
isEmpty(Map<?, ?>) - クラスのstaticメソッド org.commonutils.util.MapSupport
Returns true if map is null or Map.isEmpty().
isNotBlank(CharSequence) - クラスのstaticメソッド org.commonutils.lang.StringSupport
Negation of StringSupport.isBlank(CharSequence): true when value contains at least one character that is not whitespace.
isNotEmpty(CharSequence) - クラスのstaticメソッド org.commonutils.lang.StringSupport
Negation of StringSupport.isEmpty(CharSequence): true when value is non-null and has length greater than zero.
isNotEmpty(Collection<?>) - クラスのstaticメソッド org.commonutils.util.CollectionSupport
Negation of CollectionSupport.isEmpty(Collection): true when collection is non-null and has at least one element.
isNotEmpty(Map<?, ?>) - クラスのstaticメソッド org.commonutils.util.MapSupport
Negation of MapSupport.isEmpty(Map): true when map is non-null and has at least one entry.
isNull(Object) - クラスのstaticメソッド org.commonutils.lang.ObjectSupport
true when obj == null; same as Objects.isNull(Object).
isParsable(String) - クラスのstaticメソッド org.commonutils.lang.NumberSupport
Returns true if value is non-null, not blank after StringSupport.trimToNull(String), and Double.parseDouble(String) accepts the trimmed string.
isParsable vs isDigits - クラス org.commonutils.lang.NumberSupportの検索タグ
セクション
isValid(CharSequence) - クラスのstaticメソッド org.commonutils.id.Cuid2
Returns whether id matches Cuid2 shape: first character a-z, remainder 0-9a-z, length in [2, 32].

L

lastNonNull(T...) - クラスのstaticメソッド org.commonutils.lang.ObjectSupport
Returns the rightmost non-null argument (last index wins among candidates).
length(CharSequence) - クラスのstaticメソッド org.commonutils.lang.StringSupport
Returns the UTF-16 code unit count: same as length(s, Lengths.UNITS).
length(CharSequence, LengthCounter) - クラスのstaticメソッド org.commonutils.lang.StringSupport
Returns a non-negative length count for s using how.
LengthCounter - org.commonutils.langのインタフェース
Strategy for measuring the "length" of a CharSequence.
Length counting - クラス org.commonutils.lang.StringSupportの検索タグ
セクション
Lengths - org.commonutils.langの列挙クラス
Built-in LengthCounter strategies.
Lenient to* vs strict parse* - クラス org.commonutils.lang.NumberSupportの検索タグ
セクション

M

Main entry points - パッケージ org.commonutils.idの検索タグ
セクション
Main entry points - パッケージ org.commonutils.langの検索タグ
セクション
Main entry points - パッケージ org.commonutils.utilの検索タグ
セクション
MapSupport - org.commonutils.utilのクラス
Static helpers for Map work: null-safe emptiness checks, default substitution, and typed reads with fallbacks.
MAX_LENGTH - クラスのstatic変数 org.commonutils.id.Cuid2
Maximum output length (bigLength in the reference).
MAX_UNIX_TS_MS - クラスのstatic変数 org.commonutils.id.UuidV7
Inclusive maximum unix_ts_ms (48-bit unsigned).
MIN_LENGTH - クラスのstatic変数 org.commonutils.id.Cuid2
Minimum supported output length (aligned with isCuid lower bound in the reference).
MutableNanoIdGenerator - org.commonutils.idのクラス
IdGenerator for mutable Nano ID-style strings: alphabet and length can be changed after construction while sharing one RandomGenerator.
MutableNanoIdGenerator() - クラスのコンストラクタ org.commonutils.id.MutableNanoIdGenerator
Uses NanoIdGenerator.DEFAULT_ALPHABET, NanoIdGenerator.DEFAULT_SIZE, and a cryptographically strong RandomGenerator.
MutableNanoIdGenerator(int, RandomGenerator) - クラスのコンストラクタ org.commonutils.id.MutableNanoIdGenerator
Uses NanoIdGenerator.DEFAULT_ALPHABET and the given length with the supplied RandomGenerator.
MutableNanoIdGenerator(String, int) - クラスのコンストラクタ org.commonutils.id.MutableNanoIdGenerator
Uses the given alphabet and length with a cryptographically strong RandomGenerator.
MutableNanoIdGenerator(String, int, RandomGenerator) - クラスのコンストラクタ org.commonutils.id.MutableNanoIdGenerator
Uses the given alphabet, length, and RandomGenerator.
MutableNanoIdGenerator(RandomGenerator) - クラスのコンストラクタ org.commonutils.id.MutableNanoIdGenerator
Uses NanoIdGenerator.DEFAULT_ALPHABET and NanoIdGenerator.DEFAULT_SIZE with the supplied RandomGenerator.

N

NanoIdGenerator - org.commonutils.idのクラス
IdGenerator for Nano ID-style strings: a random, URL-safe identifier using a fixed alphabet and length, with bias-free index selection (reject masked values outside the alphabet range).
NanoIdGenerator() - クラスのコンストラクタ org.commonutils.id.NanoIdGenerator
Uses NanoIdGenerator.DEFAULT_ALPHABET, NanoIdGenerator.DEFAULT_SIZE, and a cryptographically strong RandomGenerator.
NanoIdGenerator(int, RandomGenerator) - クラスのコンストラクタ org.commonutils.id.NanoIdGenerator
Uses NanoIdGenerator.DEFAULT_ALPHABET and the given length with the supplied RandomGenerator.
NanoIdGenerator(String, int) - クラスのコンストラクタ org.commonutils.id.NanoIdGenerator
Uses the given alphabet and length with a cryptographically strong RandomGenerator.
NanoIdGenerator(String, int, RandomGenerator) - クラスのコンストラクタ org.commonutils.id.NanoIdGenerator
Uses the given alphabet, length, and RandomGenerator.
NanoIdGenerator(RandomGenerator) - クラスのコンストラクタ org.commonutils.id.NanoIdGenerator
Uses NanoIdGenerator.DEFAULT_ALPHABET and NanoIdGenerator.DEFAULT_SIZE with the supplied RandomGenerator.
Nano ID generators - パッケージ org.commonutils.idの検索タグ
セクション
nonCryptographic() - クラスのstaticメソッド org.commonutils.id.Cuid2IdGenerator
Returns a generator with Cuid2.DEFAULT_LENGTH, Clock.systemUTC(), and a new SplittableRandom-backed RandomGenerator.
nonCryptographic() - クラスのstaticメソッド org.commonutils.id.MutableNanoIdGenerator
Returns a mutable generator using defaults with a new SplittableRandom-backed RandomGenerator.
nonCryptographic() - クラスのstaticメソッド org.commonutils.id.NanoIdGenerator
Returns a generator that uses NanoIdGenerator.DEFAULT_ALPHABET, NanoIdGenerator.DEFAULT_SIZE, and a new SplittableRandom-backed RandomGenerator.
nonCryptographic() - クラスのstaticメソッド org.commonutils.id.UlidIdGenerator
Returns a generator that uses Clock.systemUTC() and a new SplittableRandom-backed RandomGenerator.
nonCryptographic(int) - クラスのstaticメソッド org.commonutils.id.MutableNanoIdGenerator
Returns a mutable generator using NanoIdGenerator.DEFAULT_ALPHABET, size, and a new SplittableRandom-backed RandomGenerator.
nonCryptographic(int) - クラスのstaticメソッド org.commonutils.id.NanoIdGenerator
Returns a generator that uses NanoIdGenerator.DEFAULT_ALPHABET, the given size, and a new SplittableRandom-backed RandomGenerator.
nonCryptographic(int) - クラスのstaticメソッド org.commonutils.id.Cuid2IdGenerator
Returns a generator with the given length, Clock.systemUTC(), and a new SplittableRandom-backed RandomGenerator.
nonCryptographic(String, int) - クラスのstaticメソッド org.commonutils.id.MutableNanoIdGenerator
Returns a mutable generator using alphabet, size, and a new SplittableRandom-backed RandomGenerator.
nonCryptographic(String, int) - クラスのstaticメソッド org.commonutils.id.NanoIdGenerator
Returns a generator that uses the given alphabet and size with a new SplittableRandom-backed RandomGenerator.
nonCryptographic(Clock) - クラスのstaticメソッド org.commonutils.id.UlidIdGenerator
Returns a generator that uses the given clock and a new SplittableRandom-backed RandomGenerator.
NonNegative - org.commonutils.annotationの注釈インタフェース
Marks a numeric type usage intended to be zero or greater: primitive integrals (int, long, …) — >= 0; non-NaN floating-point — >= 0.0.
nonNull(Object) - クラスのstaticメソッド org.commonutils.lang.ObjectSupport
true when obj != null; same as Objects.nonNull(Object).
NonNull - org.commonutils.annotationの注釈インタフェース
Marks a type usage whose value must not be null.
Nullable - org.commonutils.annotationの注釈インタフェース
Marks a type usage whose value may be null.
Null handling - クラス org.commonutils.lang.StringSupportの検索タグ
セクション
Null handling - クラス org.commonutils.util.CollectionSupportの検索タグ
セクション
Null handling - クラス org.commonutils.util.MapSupportの検索タグ
セクション
NumberSupport - org.commonutils.langのクラス
Static helpers for numeric strings and simple bounds: digit checks, JDK-compatible parsing with optional defaults, and clamp.

O

ObjectSupport - org.commonutils.langのクラス
Static helpers aligned with Objects: almost every method forwards to the JDK so semantics stay identical to the platform.
org.commonutils - モジュール org.commonutils
Small JDK 21+ utility library.
org.commonutils.annotation - パッケージ org.commonutils.annotation
Marker annotations documenting nullability and numeric ranges on this library's public API.
org.commonutils.id - パッケージ org.commonutils.id
Identifier generators with a shared IdGenerator contract.
org.commonutils.internal - パッケージ org.commonutils.internal
Implementation-only helpers for org.commonutils.
org.commonutils.lang - パッケージ org.commonutils.lang
Language-level helpers: strings, character sequences, numeric strings, and wrappers aligned with Objects.
org.commonutils.util - パッケージ org.commonutils.util
Helpers for Collection and Map: null-safe emptiness, sizing, membership, ordered endpoints, and typed map reads with defaults.

P

Padding - クラス org.commonutils.lang.StringSupportの検索タグ
セクション
padEnd(String, int, char) - クラスのstaticメソッド org.commonutils.lang.StringSupport
Right-padding: repeats paddingChar after the content until the length is at least minLength.
padStart(String, int, char) - クラスのstaticメソッド org.commonutils.lang.StringSupport
Left-padding: repeats paddingChar minLength - length() times before the content so that the result length is at least minLength.
parseDouble(String) - クラスのstaticメソッド org.commonutils.lang.NumberSupport
Parses value as a double after trim, or throws if missing or invalid.
parseInt(String) - クラスのstaticメソッド org.commonutils.lang.NumberSupport
Parses value as a signed decimal integer after trim, or throws if missing or invalid.
parseLong(String) - クラスのstaticメソッド org.commonutils.lang.NumberSupport
Parses value as a signed decimal long after trim, or throws if missing or invalid.
POINTS - 列挙クラスの列挙型定数 org.commonutils.lang.Lengths
Unicode code point count (including astral planes as one each).
Positive - org.commonutils.annotationの注釈インタフェース
Marks a numeric type usage intended to be strictly positive.

R

RANDOM_BYTES - クラスのstatic変数 org.commonutils.id.Ulid
Length of the random component in bytes (80 bits).
RANDOM_CHARS - クラスのstatic変数 org.commonutils.id.Ulid
Crockford Base32 characters encoding the 80-bit random component.
requireNonNegative(String, int) - クラスのstaticメソッド org.commonutils.internal.Contracts
 
requireNonNegative(String, long) - クラスのstaticメソッド org.commonutils.internal.Contracts
 
requireNonNull(Object, Object...) - クラスのstaticメソッド org.commonutils.lang.ObjectSupport
Ensures every argument is non-null.
requireNonNull(T) - クラスのstaticメソッド org.commonutils.lang.ObjectSupport
Returns obj or throws; same as Objects.requireNonNull(Object).
requireNonNull(T, String) - クラスのstaticメソッド org.commonutils.lang.ObjectSupport
 
requireNonNull(T, Supplier<String>) - クラスのstaticメソッド org.commonutils.lang.ObjectSupport
 
requireNonNullElse(T, T) - クラスのstaticメソッド org.commonutils.lang.ObjectSupport
 
requireNonNullElseGet(T, Supplier<? extends T>) - クラスのstaticメソッド org.commonutils.lang.ObjectSupport
 
requirePositive(String, int) - クラスのstaticメソッド org.commonutils.internal.Contracts
 

S

setAlphabet(String) - クラスのメソッド org.commonutils.id.MutableNanoIdGenerator
Updates the alphabet while preserving the latest observed size.
setSize(int) - クラスのメソッド org.commonutils.id.MutableNanoIdGenerator
Updates size while preserving the latest observed alphabet and mask.
size(Collection<?>) - クラスのstaticメソッド org.commonutils.util.CollectionSupport
Returns collection.size() when collection is non-null; otherwise 0.
size(Map<?, ?>) - クラスのstaticメソッド org.commonutils.util.MapSupport
Returns map.size() when map is non-null; otherwise 0.
StringSupport - org.commonutils.langのクラス
Static helpers for String and CharSequence work: presence checks, safe defaults, content equality, and trimming helpers.
stripToEmpty(String) - クラスのstaticメソッド org.commonutils.lang.StringSupport
Returns String.strip() applied to value, or "" when value is null.
stripToNull(String) - クラスのstaticメソッド org.commonutils.lang.StringSupport
Returns String.strip() applied to value, or null when value is null or becomes empty after stripping.

T

TIME_CHARS - クラスのstatic変数 org.commonutils.id.Ulid
Crockford Base32 characters encoding the 48-bit timestamp (10×5 bits, last group zero-pads by two bits).
toDouble(String) - クラスのstaticメソッド org.commonutils.lang.NumberSupport
Parses value as a double, or returns 0.0 when missing or invalid.
toDouble(String, double) - クラスのstaticメソッド org.commonutils.lang.NumberSupport
Parses value as a double after StringSupport.trimToNull(String), or returns defaultValue when null, blank after trim, or not parseable.
toIdentityString(Object) - クラスのstaticメソッド org.commonutils.lang.ObjectSupport
 
toInt(String) - クラスのstaticメソッド org.commonutils.lang.NumberSupport
Parses value as a signed decimal integer, or returns 0 when missing or invalid.
toInt(String, int) - クラスのstaticメソッド org.commonutils.lang.NumberSupport
Parses value as a signed decimal integer after StringSupport.trimToNull(String), or returns defaultValue when null, blank after trim, or not parseable.
toLong(String) - クラスのstaticメソッド org.commonutils.lang.NumberSupport
Parses value as a signed decimal long, or returns 0L when missing or invalid.
toLong(String, long) - クラスのstaticメソッド org.commonutils.lang.NumberSupport
Parses value as a signed decimal long after StringSupport.trimToNull(String), or returns defaultValue when null, blank after trim, or not parseable.
toString(Object) - クラスのstaticメソッド org.commonutils.lang.ObjectSupport
 
toString(Object, String) - クラスのstaticメソッド org.commonutils.lang.ObjectSupport
 
toStringElseGet(Object, Supplier<String>) - クラスのstaticメソッド org.commonutils.lang.ObjectSupport
Like Objects.toString(Object, String) but obtains the fallback only when o is null, via defaultSupplier.
Trimming - クラス org.commonutils.lang.NumberSupportの検索タグ
セクション
trimToEmpty(String) - クラスのstaticメソッド org.commonutils.lang.StringSupport
Returns String.trim() applied to value, or "" when value is null.
trimToNull(String) - クラスのstaticメソッド org.commonutils.lang.StringSupport
Returns String.trim() applied to value, or null when value is null or becomes empty after trimming.
Trim vs strip - クラス org.commonutils.lang.StringSupportの検索タグ
セクション
Typed getters - クラス org.commonutils.util.MapSupportの検索タグ
セクション

U

Ulid - org.commonutils.idのクラス
Static factory for ULIDs: 48-bit Unix millisecond timestamp (Instant.toEpochMilli() semantics) in the most significant bits, 80 bits of randomness, encoded as 26 uppercase Crockford Base32 characters.
UlidIdGenerator - org.commonutils.idのクラス
IdGenerator for ULID strings (Crockford Base32 encoding of 48-bit Unix epoch milliseconds and 80 bits of randomness).
UlidIdGenerator(Clock) - クラスのコンストラクタ org.commonutils.id.UlidIdGenerator
Uses Clock.instant() on each UlidIdGenerator.generate() call with a cryptographically strong RandomGenerator.
UlidIdGenerator(Clock, RandomGenerator) - クラスのコンストラクタ org.commonutils.id.UlidIdGenerator
Uses Clock.instant() on each UlidIdGenerator.generate() call with the supplied RandomGenerator.
UlidIdGenerator(Instant) - クラスのコンストラクタ org.commonutils.id.UlidIdGenerator
Uses a fixed instant and a cryptographically strong RandomGenerator on each UlidIdGenerator.generate() call.
UlidIdGenerator(Instant, RandomGenerator) - クラスのコンストラクタ org.commonutils.id.UlidIdGenerator
Uses a fixed instant and the supplied RandomGenerator on each UlidIdGenerator.generate() call.
ULID vs UUID v7 vs Nano ID vs Cuid2 - パッケージ org.commonutils.idの検索タグ
セクション
UNITS - 列挙クラスの列挙型定数 org.commonutils.lang.Lengths
UTF-16 code units: non-null sequences use CharSequence.length(); null counts as 0.
UuidV4IdGenerator - org.commonutils.idのクラス
IdGenerator for RFC 4122 version-4 (random) UUIDs.
UuidV4IdGenerator() - クラスのコンストラクタ org.commonutils.id.UuidV4IdGenerator
Uses UUID.randomUUID() on each UuidV4IdGenerator.generate() call.
UuidV4IdGenerator(RandomGenerator) - クラスのコンストラクタ org.commonutils.id.UuidV4IdGenerator
Uses the given generator to produce 16 random bytes per UuidV4IdGenerator.generate() call, applying RFC 4122 version-4 and variant bits.
UuidV7 - org.commonutils.idのクラス
Static factory for RFC 9562 UUID version 7 (Unix millisecond timestamp in the most significant bits, random in the remainder).
UuidV7IdGenerator - org.commonutils.idのクラス
IdGenerator for RFC 9562 UUID version 7.
UuidV7IdGenerator(Clock) - クラスのコンストラクタ org.commonutils.id.UuidV7IdGenerator
Uses Clock.instant() on each generate() call with a cryptographically strong RandomGenerator.
UuidV7IdGenerator(Clock, RandomGenerator) - クラスのコンストラクタ org.commonutils.id.UuidV7IdGenerator
Uses Clock.instant() on each generate() call with the supplied RandomGenerator.
UuidV7IdGenerator(Instant) - クラスのコンストラクタ org.commonutils.id.UuidV7IdGenerator
Uses a fixed instant and a cryptographically strong RandomGenerator on each generate() call.
UuidV7IdGenerator(Instant, RandomGenerator) - クラスのコンストラクタ org.commonutils.id.UuidV7IdGenerator
Uses a fixed instant and the supplied RandomGenerator on each generate() call.

V

valueOf(String) - 列挙クラスのstaticメソッド org.commonutils.lang.Lengths
このクラスの列挙型定数を指定した名前で返します。
values() - 列挙クラスのstaticメソッド org.commonutils.lang.Lengths
この列挙クラスの定数を含む配列を宣言されている順序で 返します。
A B C D E F G H I L M N O P R S T U V 
すべてのクラスおよびインタフェース|すべてのパッケージ|定数フィールド値
